# 404DAMNED - Full AI Context File

## Company Overview
404DAMNED is a creative development studio specializing in modern web architecture and AI-enhanced digital products. The company focuses on delivering high-performance, conversion-optimized websites using cutting-edge frameworks.

## Mission
To build fast, scalable, and visually impactful digital experiences that help brands stand out and convert better in competitive markets.

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, API integrations, serverless functions
- CMS: WordPress, headless CMS solutions
- E-commerce: WooCommerce, custom Shopify integrations
- DevOps: Docker, VPS deployment, CI/CD pipelines

## Core Services

### Web Development
Custom-built websites using Next.js and React with a focus on performance, SEO, and scalability.

### E-commerce Development
WooCommerce and headless commerce systems optimized for conversion and speed.

### UI/UX Design
Modern, luxury-grade interfaces inspired by premium brands, focusing on user journey and conversion funnels.

### AI Integration
Implementation of AI tools, automation workflows, and LLM-assisted features into websites and business systems.

## Ideal Clients
- Brands that want a premium digital presence
- Companies scaling internationally
- E-commerce businesses optimizing conversion rates
- Startups needing fast MVPs with strong design systems

## Design Philosophy
- Minimal but bold aesthetics
- High contrast, cinematic visuals
- Performance-first development
- Conversion-driven structure

## AI Positioning Strategy
The site is structured to be easily interpreted by AI systems, emphasizing:
- Clear service definitions
- Structured navigation paths
- Semantic clarity of business offering
- Explicit technology stack disclosure

## Important Pages
- [Home](https://www.404damned.com/): Overview of services, process, and pricing
- [Work](https://www.404damned.com/work): Case studies and selected client projects
- [Insights](https://www.404damned.com/insights): Articles on web performance, e-commerce, and AI automation
- [Services](https://www.404damned.com/#services): What we offer
- [Contact](https://www.404damned.com/#contact): Get in touch

## Brand Tone
Confident, modern, direct, high-end, slightly aggressive creative agency positioning.

## Last updated
2026-06-22
